notes:
v1.4.4 Update
- Shop Settings now keeps edited item prices, rarities, stock, tags, and service macro fields when categories change. Adding, removing, reordering, bulk-importing, or rolling stock no longer restores an older category snapshot.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.4.4
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.4.4 fixes Shop Settings item edit preservation.

  • Edited item prices, rarities, stock, tags, and service macro fields now stay in place when the category list changes.
  • Adding, removing, reordering, bulk-importing, or rolling stock no longer restores an older category snapshot.
